RAID LOG — Healthcare Integration Pilot
PC: T. Adeyemi | 2026-04-15

RISKS
R1 | Vendor API v2 deprecation 90 days out
    Impact: High. Patient lookup endpoint affected.
    Likelihood: High. Vendor confirmed.
    Owner: Lead engineer (on leave). Backup: TBD.
    Mitigation: Plan migration before sunset.

R2 | Scope creep — 3 new endpoints added since kickoff
    Impact: Medium. Could miss stabilization window.
    Owner: Product owner.
    Mitigation: Push back on additional endpoints until pilot stabilizes.

R3 | Lead engineer on paternity leave 4 weeks
    Impact: Medium. Slows down active work.
    Owner: Engineering manager.
    Mitigation: Cross-train backup engineer.

R4 | Premature expansion to clinics B + C
    Impact: High. Pilot KPIs not yet met.
    Owner: Steering committee.
    Mitigation: Bring data-backed case to defer expansion.

R5 | Training behind schedule for clinic staff
    Impact: Medium.
    Owner: Training lead.
    Mitigation: Add make-up sessions.

(No Assumptions, Issues, or Dependencies sections in this version.)
